L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 3051] ubZ fnYyh] eaxyokj] fnlEcj 27] 2016@ikS"k 6] 1938 No. 3051] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, DECEMBER 27, 2016/PAUSA 6, 1938 कारपोरेट कायᭅ मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 26 ᳰदस᭥बर, 2016 का.आ. 4167(अ).—के᭠ᮤीय सरकार, कंपनी अिधिनयम, 2013 (2013 का 18) कᳱ ध ारा 1 कᳱ उपधारा (3) ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए 26 ᳰदसंबर, 2016 को वह तारीख िनयुᲦ करती है, जब उᲦ अिधिनयम कᳱ धारा 248 से धारा 252 के उपबंध ᮧवृᱫ हᲂगे। [फा.सं.1/28/2013-सीएल-V] अमरदीप ᳲसह भाᳯटया, संयुᲦ सिचव MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th December, 2016 S.O. 4167(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 1 of the Companies Act, 20l3 (18 of 20l3), the Central Government hereby appoints the 26th December, 2016 as the date on which the provisions of section 248 to 252 of the said Act, shall come into force. [F. No. 1/28/2013-CL-V] AMARDEEP SINGH BHATIA, Jt.
